_description: Output has escalation_required=True set by the pipeline. Default policy reflects this as an ESCALATION_POLICY_TRIGGERED issue. No blocking issues present. Must escalate.

input.summary: Critical GMP violations identified. Immediate corrective action required.
recommendations: Initiate immediate voluntary recall of affected batches.
